name: feature-edit-validate-loop

related_skills.name: verify
related_skills.why: After the edit-validate loop, run the app/feature to confirm the change behaves correctly in the real environment.

related_skills.name: code-review
related_skills.why: Use to review the diff for correctness bugs and cleanups once the change is made and validated.

citations: pattern: ran the actual code path to validate the edit and refresh the index
pattern: traced root cause across multiple files (tuner.py, wq_api_client.py) before proposing a fix
pattern: gave balanced design trade-offs (pros/risks) instead of jumping to refactor
